name: io.github.Whatsonyourmind/modelforge
description: Deterministic bulge-tier financial model factory — every cell live-formulated, every number source-traced to doc page. LBO, DCF, M&A, project finance, NPL, structured credit, 3-statement. IFRS-9, US GAAP, Italian regulatory pack.

environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key — required only for data-room ingestion (PDF→YAML). Optional for build/qc/lineage tools.
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
